brand.name: HAJonSoft
contact-send-us-message-and-we-will-repl: Send us a message — we'll get back to you in no time.
contact.name: Name
contact.we-received-your-message: Thanks! We've received your message and will be in touch shortly.
countries.global-reach: Serving clients across {count} countries — our software speaks every language of business.
demo.description: Watch how our AI Agents read passports, automate official Saudi portals, and submit traveller information with Owl—silently in the cloud.
demo.title: See Our AI Agents in Action
features.bau-sender-description: Built for Hajj missions and mission companies on https://masar.nusuk.sa—the same Ministry portal as Umrah. Submit large volumes of passports quickly with Owl cloud execution so missions are not limited to a single desktop.
features.complete-software: An AI Agent in HAJonSoft is an intelligent automation workflow for a specific Saudi visa website: it can log in, solve captchas, handle OTPs, read passport data, fill forms, and submit applications—often via Owl on our cloud servers so nothing needs to stay installed or running on your machine. Our five agents cover Nusuk Umrah, Enjaz work visas, Nusuk Hajj for non-mission countries, Nusuk Hajj for mission companies, and Visit Saudi eVisa.
features.ehaj-integration-description: Automates Enjaz / KSA Visa workflows at https://services.ksavisa.sa. Logs in with your credentials, solves captchas, retrieves visa information from MOFA, and submits passport data via Owl so processing can run on HAJonSoft-managed cloud machines.
features.gma-sender-description: Automates electronic visit visas on the official Saudi eVisa portal (https://visa.visitsaudi.com). Logs in and submits multiple tourist visa applications in one shot—ideal for agencies handling visit visas at scale with Owl cloud execution.
features.manage-effortlessly: Five AI Agents. Five official Saudi systems.
features.quality-passport-reader-descrip: Every AI Agent starts with accurate document reading. Upload passport images and HAJonSoft extracts identity fields for human review before cloud submission—so Umrah, Hajj, Enjaz, and Visit Visa workflows begin with clean data.
features.sell-description: Sell your travel packages 24/7 through Dove — a customizable online storefront hosted on your domain. Dove lets travelers reserve packages and securely submit passport details and personal photos with ease.
features.twf-sender-description: Supports aggregators on Nusuk Hajj (https://hajj.nusuk.sa) for non-mission / Direct Hajj countries. Help travellers through registration, document upload, verification, package selection, and booking—submit individuals one by one, monitor approvals, and assist with package purchase using guided AI Agent automation and Owl when available.
features.wtu-sender-description: Automates Umrah work on Nusuk Masar (https://masar.nusuk.sa), the Ministry of Hajj and Umrah unified partner portal. Reads passport data, supports group and visa workflows used by Umrah companies and external agents, solves captchas, retrieves OTPs, and submits silently with Owl—usable from desktop or mobile with no local install for supported cloud runs.
footer.description: HAJonSoft provides 5 intelligent AI Agents for travel agencies, aggregators, and visa processing centers worldwide. Our agents automate official Saudi systems—Nusuk Umrah, Enjaz work visas, Nusuk Hajj (global and mission), and Visit Saudi eVisa—using Owl cloud submission when you need processing off your machine.
footer.tagline: 5 AI Agents for Saudi Arabia Visa Systems
get-started.more-than-software: 5 AI Agents for Saudi Arabia Visa Systems
get-started.we-are-team: No local installs. Web-based Owl cloud submission. Captcha, OTP, photo resize, and form fill — automated for success and speed.
hero.slide.enjaz.body: For KSA Visa / Enjaz at https://services.ksavisa.sa. The AI Agent enters your username and password, solves the captcha, retrieves visa information from MOFA systems, and submits passport data silently using Owl—the same cloud engine that launches remote machines so work continues without keeping your PC online.
hero.slide.enjaz.title: Enjaz Work Visa AI Agent
hero.slide.hajj-global.body: Nusuk Hajj (https://hajj.nusuk.sa) is the Ministry of Hajj and Umrah one-stop platform for the Direct Hajj Program—serving pilgrims from countries without official Hajj missions (including many in the USA, Europe, and Australia). Aggregators and authorized service providers register travellers, upload documents, track verification, browse packages, and assist with booking. Our AI Agent helps submit individuals one by one, monitor approvals, and support package purchase—with Owl cloud automation when you need unattended processing.
hero.slide.hajj-global.title: Nusuk Hajj AI Agent (Non-Mission Countries)
hero.slide.hajj-mission.body: On the same Nusuk Masar portal (https://masar.nusuk.sa), Hajj missions and dependent Hajj companies organize and manage large pilgrim volumes for Islamic countries. Our AI Agent helps government missions submit large numbers of passports quickly—login, captcha, OTP, and bulk form completion—using Owl cloud execution so missions are not limited to a single desktop.
hero.slide.hajj-mission.title: Nusuk Hajj AI Agent (Mission Companies)
hero.slide.overview.body: Unlike desktop tools that require installs and a PC left running, HAJonSoft is built for web-based submission. Our AI Agents log in to official Saudi systems, solve captchas, retrieve OTPs, resize images, fill forms, and submit passports silently with Owl on our servers — success and efficiency without local software.
hero.slide.overview.title: Target systems we automate
hero.slide.umrah.body: Nusuk Masar (https://masar.nusuk.sa) is the Ministry of Hajj and Umrah unified platform for Hajj and Umrah partners—Umrah companies, external agents, and service providers serving Guests of Allah. Our AI Agent helps service providers do what HAJonSoft does best: read passport information, form groups, and complete visa workflows in full automation on our servers. It logs in, solves the captcha, retrieves the OTP, and submits full passport data silently with Owl. Nothing needs to stay installed on your machine—you can even send from your mobile phone.
hero.slide.umrah.title: Nusuk Umrah AI Agent
hero.slide.visit-visa.body: The official Saudi eVisa portal at https://visa.visitsaudi.com lets eligible travellers apply online for tourist visas through a fast digital process. Our AI Agent logs into the portal, completes application steps, and can submit more than one visa application in a single run—batch-friendly automation powered by Owl cloud submission so agencies process visit visas without keeping a desktop session open.
hero.slide.visit-visa.title: Visit Saudi eVisa AI Agent
hero.unique.subtitle: HAJonSoft AI Agents run in the cloud with Owl. Solve captchas, retrieve OTPs, resize photos, fill forms, and submit traveller data efficiently so your team saves hours every season — from a browser or even your phone.
hero.unique.title: No software to install on your machine — submissions are web-based
introduction-to-hajonsoft-kea: The AI Agents Manager where you feed agents with traveller data, monitor their work, and receive responses in one guided workflow—and where you can create support submissions to forward cases to HAJonSoft engineers for premium technical support.
kea.support-description: Travel agents use Kea not only to run AI Agents, but also to manage submissions and request premium support. Create a submission, forward it to our engineers, and get technical help while HAJonSoft admins can see what is happening and access the data accurately.
kea.title: HAJonSoft Kea
legal.translation-notice: This translation is provided for convenience. If there is any conflict or ambiguity, the English version of this page shall prevail.
pricing.basic-learn-more: Includes a 1GB database and 5GB for storing passport and photo data. Comes with dedicated sales and admin portals. Lifetime software updates included. This is a one-time, non-refundable purchase required to activate the software.
pricing.lifetime-learn-more: Enjoy full support for Hajj and Umrah for 15 years. We'll process your visa applications daily and ensure seamless operations for your agency, including troubleshooting and expert support.
pricing.season-support-haj-learn-more: Support includes assistance with the Hajj system, creating Ministry-required packages, and reserving pilgrims. Includes up to 100 Hajj visa submissions. We also provide guidance through meetings, videos, and hands-on help.
pricing.season-support-umrah-learn-more: Get the support required to use the software efficiently. Our support includes meetings, connecting to your machine, videos, phone calls and up to 100 visas that we will issue on your behalf included in this plan.
privacy.s1.body: We collect information you provide directly to us, such as when you create an account, contact us, or use our services. This may include your name, email address, phone number, and other contact details. We also collect traveller information that you submit through our AI Agents for the purpose of processing Saudi Arabia visa applications.
privacy.s1.title: 1. Information We Collect
privacy.s10.body: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at admin@hajonsoft.net or call us at 1 (949) 522-1879.
privacy.s10.title: 10. Contact Us
privacy.s2.body: We use the information we collect to provide, maintain, and improve our services, process visa applications on your behalf, communicate with you about our services and updates, and comply with legal obligations. Traveller data is used solely for the purpose of submitting visa applications to the relevant Saudi Arabia government systems.
privacy.s2.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
privacy.s3.body: We do not sell, trade, or otherwise transfer your personal information to outside parties except as necessary to provide our services. We may share information with Saudi Arabia visa processing systems (such as Bab Al-Umrah, eHaj, Masar, and Nusuk) as required to complete visa applications. We may also disclose information where required by law or to protect our rights.
privacy.s3.title: 3. Information Sharing
privacy.s4.body: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. However, no method of transmission over the Internet or method of electronic storage is 100% secure.
privacy.s4.title: 4. Data Security
privacy.s5.body: We retain your personal information for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this Privacy Policy, comply with our legal obligations, resolve disputes, and enforce our agreements. Traveller passport data is retained in your local database and is under your control.
privacy.s5.title: 5. Data Retention
privacy.s6.body: Depending on your location, you may have certain rights regarding your personal information, including the right to access, correct, or delete your data. To exercise these rights, please contact us at admin@hajonsoft.net.
privacy.s6.title: 6. Your Rights
privacy.s7.body: Our website may use cookies and similar tracking technologies to enhance your experience. You can control cookie settings through your browser. Some features of our service may not function properly if cookies are disabled.
privacy.s7.title: 7. Cookies
privacy.s8.body: Our services integrate with third-party platforms including Saudi Arabia government visa systems, Firebase for data storage, and analytics services. These third parties have their own privacy policies governing the use of your information.
privacy.s8.title: 8. Third-Party Services
privacy.s9.body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page with an updated effective date. Your continued use of our services after any changes constitutes acceptance of the new policy.
privacy.s9.title: 9. Changes to This Policy
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
seo.home.description: HAJonSoft provides 5 AI Agents that automate Nusuk Umrah, Enjaz/KSA Visa, Nusuk Hajj, and Visit Saudi eVisa—captcha, OTP, photo resize, and Owl cloud submission for travel agencies worldwide.
seo.home.title: HAJonSoft | AI Agents for Saudi Visa, Hajj & Umrah Automation
seo.privacy.description: Read how HAJonSoft collects, uses, and protects personal data when you use our visa automation platform.
seo.privacy.title: Privacy Policy | HAJonSoft
seo.technology.description: Learn how HAJonSoft Kea, Eagle, and Owl combine document intelligence, workflow automation, cloud submission, and premium support submissions for Saudi visa systems.
seo.technology.title: About the Technology | HAJonSoft
seo.terms.description: Terms governing use of HAJonSoft software, AI Agents, and related services for travel and visa processing.
seo.terms.title: Terms of Service | HAJonSoft
technology.capabilities.title: Core Capabilities
technology.document.body: Users can upload images of passports, identification cards, and other travel documents. HAJonSoft extracts relevant information such as names, dates, document numbers, nationality, and other identity fields using a combination of Google Cloud AI document-recognition services and the open-source Tesseract OCR engine. The extracted information is presented for quick human review and correction before it is used in an application or workflow.
technology.document.title: Document Intelligence
technology.eagle.p1: HAJonSoft Eagle is an automation tool that takes your document data and submits it to external systems. It helps you skip repetitive steps and reduces the risk of user error during data entry.
technology.eagle.p2: Eagle runs on your computer, while Owl runs on HAJonSoft-managed cloud machines. Same engine, different operating model.
technology.eagle.p3: The eagle is a bird of prey well known for its power and keen eyesight.
technology.eagle.title: What is Eagle?
technology.introduction.p1: HAJonSoft is a cloud-based intelligent automation platform designed to eliminate manual data entry and repetitive submission work for travel agencies, visa-processing centers, and organizations handling Hajj, Umrah, Visit Visa, Nusuk, and other document-intensive application workflows.
technology.introduction.p2: Rather than relying on a separate AI agent, HAJonSoft combines document intelligence, structured cloud data, workflow logic, browser automation, and scalable cloud execution into a unified platform developed specifically for complex submission and processing environments.
technology.introduction.title: Introduction
technology.kea.p1: HAJonSoft Kea is the passenger and document management program you reach when you click Login. It is designed to streamline every aspect of document processing in the travel industry—and to give travel agents a clear place to manage work and request help.
technology.kea.p2: The kea is one of the most intelligent birds in the world and is native to New Zealand. Well known for their problem-solving ability—and for stealing your chips while camping—the kea is a fitting namesake for HAJonSoft's tenacity, hustle, and innovation.
technology.kea.p3: Kea also lets users manage submissions and access premium support. Travel agents can create a support submission and forward it to HAJonSoft engineers for technical assistance. That keeps agencies productive while HAJonSoft admins can see what is happening and access the data accurately.
technology.kea.title: What is Kea?
technology.owl.p1: HAJonSoft Owl is our cloud submission system. It launches one or more cloud computers, installs Eagle, and submits your passengers from our servers instead of yours.
technology.owl.p2: The owl is a silent bird, which is why we chose the name. Owl sends passengers silently and efficiently, and when chunking is available it can split a single submission across multiple machines for real Owl power: strong, quiet, and efficient.
technology.owl.title: What is Owl?
technology.ownership.p2: HAJonSoft, including its software platform, source code, automation technology, user interfaces, documentation, and associated intellectual property, was created by Ayman Ali and Hesham Jones.
technology.ownership.p3: Unauthorized copying, reproduction, reverse engineering, modification, distribution, or commercial use of HAJonSoft is prohibited except where expressly permitted in writing.
technology.ownership.title: Ownership
technology.products.intro: HAJonSoft modularizes its features under three complementary product names—Kea, Eagle, and Owl—so each part of the platform has a clear role, from managing passengers and support submissions to submitting work locally or in the cloud.
technology.products.title: Kea, Eagle, and Owl
technology.records.body: After verification, traveller information is organized into reusable passenger records and stored securely in the cloud. These records can be reviewed, corrected, updated, reused, and submitted to multiple supported destination systems without requiring the same information to be entered manually for every application.
technology.records.title: Structured Passenger Records
technology.scale.item1: No customer computer needs to remain powered on or logged in while supported cloud workflows are running.
technology.scale.item2: Multiple applications can be processed concurrently instead of waiting for one local machine to complete them sequentially.
technology.scale.item3: Large workloads can be distributed across cloud resources rather than being limited by the customer's hardware.
technology.scale.item4: Work can be scheduled for unattended, overnight, or bulk processing.
technology.scale.item5: Agencies can increase processing capacity without purchasing or maintaining additional desktop computers.
technology.scale.p1: Unlike traditional desktop automation tools that can only operate while a customer's computer remains powered on and connected, HAJonSoft can execute supported automation workflows using its cloud infrastructure. This provides several customer benefits:
technology.scale.p2: The result is highly scalable, concurrent processing capacity that can grow with demand—large-scale parallel processing that is not limited to a single customer machine.
technology.scale.title: Built for Scale: Cloud Execution
technology.stack.intro: HAJonSoft is built using a modern cloud-based technology stack:
technology.stack.item3: Browser workflow automation: Puppeteer and related browser technologies
technology.stack.item4: Document intelligence: Google Cloud AI document recognition and Tesseract OCR
technology.stack.item5: Data platform: Firebase and Google Cloud
technology.stack.item7: Task execution: Cloud-based task scheduling and distributed workflow processing
technology.stack.title: Technology Stack
technology.subtitle: HAJonSoft intelligent automation platform
technology.title: About the Technology
technology.workflow.item2: Calculate or provide required default values
technology.workflow.p1: HAJonSoft uses the verified passenger information to automate submission workflows on supported destination systems. Where helpful, the platform can also modify the page DOM and enhance the target site by adding additional controls that let users perform custom actions directly on the target system.
technology.workflow.p2: Depending on the workflow, intelligent automated workflow execution can:
technology.workflow.title: Intelligent Workflow Automation
terms.s1.body: By accessing or using HAJonSoft's services, software, or website, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our services. These terms apply to all users, including travel agencies, visa processing centers, and individual users.
terms.s1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
terms.s10.body: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your access to our services if you violate these Terms of Service or engage in fraudulent, abusive, or illegal activities. Upon termination, your right to use the software ceases, but your locally stored data remains accessible to you.
terms.s10.title: 10. Termination
terms.s11.body: We may update these Terms of Service from time to time. We will notify users of material changes by posting the updated terms on this page with a new effective date. Continued use of our services after changes constitutes your acceptance of the updated terms.
terms.s11.title: 11. Changes to Terms
terms.s12.body: These Terms of Service are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the United States. Any disputes arising from these terms shall be resolved through good-faith negotiation, and if necessary, through binding arbitration.
terms.s12.title: 12. Governing Law
terms.s13.body: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us at admin@hajonsoft.net or call us at 1 (949) 522-1879.
terms.s13.title: 13. Contact Us
terms.s2.body: HAJonSoft provides AI-powered automation software and agents for Saudi Arabia visa processing. Our services include AI Agents for Umrah, Hajj, Visit Visa, Nusuk, and passport scanning. These agents automate the submission of traveller information to Saudi Arabia official visa systems including Bab Al-Umrah, eHaj, Masar, and the Nusuk platform.
terms.s2.title: 2. Description of Services
terms.s3.body: Upon purchase, HAJonSoft grants you a non-exclusive, non-transferable license to use our software for your internal business operations. You may not copy, modify, distribute, sell, or sublicense our software. Software licenses are for a single organization and may not be shared across multiple entities. Lifetime software updates are included in the one-time purchase as specified in your plan.
terms.s3.title: 3. License and Software Use
terms.s4.body: You are responsible for ensuring the accuracy of all traveller information submitted through our AI Agents. You must comply with all applicable laws, regulations, and requirements of Saudi Arabia visa authorities. You agree to use our services only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these Terms. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials.
terms.s4.title: 4. User Responsibilities
terms.s5.body: All purchases are one-time, non-refundable payments unless otherwise specified. Seasonal support plans are valid for the applicable visa season. Proxy visa submission services are charged per submission as outlined in your selected plan. Prices are subject to change with advance notice.
terms.s5.title: 5. Payment Terms
terms.s6.body: We strive to maintain continuous service availability but do not guarantee uninterrupted access. Our AI Agents depend on the availability and stability of Saudi Arabia government visa systems, which are outside our control. We will notify users of planned maintenance and work to minimize downtime. Service disruptions caused by changes to official Saudi Arabia systems will be addressed as promptly as possible.
terms.s6.title: 6. Service Availability
terms.s7.body: All intellectual property rights in our software, website, and services belong to HAJonSoft. Our trademarks, logos, and service names are proprietary to HAJonSoft and may not be used without our prior written consent. You retain ownership of all traveller data you submit through our services.
terms.s7.title: 7. Intellectual Property
terms.s8.body: HAJonSoft shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages resulting from your use of our services. We are not responsible for visa rejections, processing delays, or decisions made by Saudi Arabia visa authorities. Our total liability to you shall not exceed the amount paid for the specific service giving rise to the claim.
terms.s8.title: 8. Limitation of Liability
terms.s9.body: Our services are provided "as is" without warranties of any kind, either express or implied. We do not warrant that our services will be error-free, uninterrupted, or free from viruses or other harmful components. We do not guarantee visa approval outcomes as these are solely determined by Saudi Arabia government authorities.
terms.s9.title: 9. Disclaimer of Warranties
terms.title: Terms of Service
